resolutions.finding: Local synthetic and protected production evidence are represented as different provenance values and cannot satisfy the same phase gate.
Alpha closes every production feature flag; Beta is Raw-only; M3 is fixed to Budget 1; GA has no guessed mutation budget.

The ledger distinguishes one pre-Secret context rejection from eleven protected first attempts. The latest exact-main attempt passed Alpha, Raw-only Beta and identity cleanup with 100% remote Raw recovery, zero Gmail mutation and no workflow rerun.

After the real T0702 PASS and five failed T0703 attempts, the Owner's standing instruction authorizes fully automatic Stage 7 continuation without calendar waits or manual approval and confirms the GitHub App installation and private-repository link. The current Run Contract consumes only one new exact reconciliation delivery and one attempt-1 dispatch with zero new Gmail or private-repository writes.

Five different exact-main T0703 attempt-1 runs passed their authority gates and identity cleanup but failed the M3 job. The first four had zero observed effects. The fifth returned MUTATION_FAILED after Raw and Processed recovery; processed-current changed from zero to one and Gmail Trash aggregate increased by one, but those aggregates do not establish exact-source attribution. All failed heads are immutable and cannot be rerun or redispatched.
The owner-authorized v1.0.2 successor routes every task evidence record through its exact stage schema while preserving BLOCKED, PARTIAL and NOT_RUN claims.

Local deterministic tests preserve prior repairs, select exactly one verified Trash source backed by a pre-existing opaque processed-current pointer, repeat Raw and Processed remote recovery plus second sender verification, and reject zero or multiple matches. Raw, Processed and Gmail mutation writes are unreachable in reconciliation mode. No protected PASS is claimed.

Owner direction removes fixed seven-day and fourteen-day waits from Stage 7. M3 and Blue-Green can each complete in one bounded protected run when their deterministic recovery, mutation, comparison, reconciliation and single-Timeline evidence is complete; predecessor and safety gates remain fail closed.

T0703 retains every prior fail-closed repair. The fifth failure disclosed MUTATION_FAILED only; the candidate binds the sole new encrypted Processed lineage to exactly one verified Trash source and confirms the prior unknown outcome without another mutation. Broader authentication, authorization, transport, identity, unique-selection and recovery failures remain hard; exactly one reconciliation dispatch is pending.

final_acceptance_policy: No local test, workflow definition or elapsed wall-clock claim can convert a protected production Oracle to PASS.
